Veterans Benefits: Montana working military retirees may qualify for a military-retirement and survivor-benefit income-tax exemption; qualifying disabled veteran homeowners may receive income-based property-tax relief.

Description: Great Falls is a north-central Montana city with a local VA clinic and Malmstrom Air Force Base. It offers access to the Missouri River corridor, regional museums and arts, and outdoor recreation while serving as a practical military and service hub.
